prompt: Create a login form in HTML and CSS with an email field, a password field, a primary 'Sign In' button, and a 'Forgot your password?' link. Make it clean and easy to use. Output a single self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS.
assertions: Uses hsl() color notation for color values
Primary button uses font-weight >= 600 for strong visual emphasis
Label-to-input spacing is visually tighter than the spacing between separate form groups
Input fields have a visible focus state or border styling
